title: Hedlundia hohenesteri
taxonomy: Hedlundia hohenesteri is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to New Zealand. The classification of Hedlundia hohenesteri includes being in the genus Hedlundia, which is part of the Apiaceae family. More specifically, it is classified as a member of the family Apiaceae, order Apiales, and class Magnoliopsida. The genus Hedlundia is a monotypic genus, containing only this species.
